creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Fellow stationery lovers ✏️ This is a DREAMY stationery shop in London that you’ve probably never heard of! This is @presentandcorrect in @bloomsburylondon and it’s a beautifully curated store with beautiful, unusual, retro and vintage stationery. The layout of the store is so calming and you’ll likely find brands here that you’ve never heard.

Share this with someone who needs to visit!
📍 12 Bury Pl, London WC1A 2JL
🗓️ Open Mon-Sat 11am-6pm

#presentandcorrect #londonstationery

transcription.text: If you're a stationery lover, this is a must visit stationery shop in London. It's called Present and Correct and it's in Bloomsbury and they sell a beautifully curated selection of stationery. The layout of the store is so calming but it is packed full of goodies. It's an independent store and they stock some really unusual brands, perfect if you're really into your stationery or you're looking for a gift or simply some inspiration and they're graphic design inspired. So make sure you save this and share it with someone who would love to go.
